description: Branch 1: auto-safe action available. Stolen token detected — revoke-stolen-token is pre-authorized (auto-safe). Escalate agent should call remediate-action immediately, send action-receipt to operator, and close as remediated.

finding.detail: Personal access token used from IP 45.79.112.203 (geo: RO) — 0 prior uses from this IP, token's baseline: exclusively US/EU corporate IPs
finding.investigate_annotation: Token not distinguishable from stolen credential use. New IP, foreign geo, 0 baseline history for this source. action_class escalated as auto-safe (revoke-stolen-token pre-authorized per token-abuse-detector registry).

list_actions_response.description: Revoke the GitHub personal access token. Immediate, reversible. No service disruption for legitimate users (new token can be issued via onboarding).

fail_if.note: Auto-safe actions must NOT wait for approval
